what_changed: Softer U.S. inflation reduced the immediate probability of additional Federal Reserve tightening, but policymakers still require more evidence before changing course.
The ECB remains inflation-sensitive after its June rate increase, while current communication favours caution rather than an immediate additional move.
Semiconductor demand remains structurally supportive, while higher oil prices and geopolitical tension keep cross-asset confirmation mixed.

regime_memory.decision_rule: Retain cash and require current UCITS pricing, verified trading-line identity and a separate allocation decision before funding any candidate.

report_transfer.summary: Disinflation improves the policy backdrop, but ECB vigilance, oil risk and mixed breadth do not yet justify automatic capital deployment.

fed.likely_direction: Hold while assessing whether softer inflation persists
fed.main_risk: A renewed inflation impulse or stronger AI-related demand could delay easing and pressure duration-sensitive assets.
fed.etf_implication: Prefer broad profitable equity exposure and cash discipline over unverified high-beta thematic allocations.

ecb.likely_direction: Hold near term while monitoring oil, wages and second-round inflation effects
ecb.main_risk: Renewed energy inflation may raise the hurdle for rate-sensitive European assets and bonds.
ecb.etf_implication: Do not add European or duration exposure without current relative-strength, pricing and instrument verification.

portfolio_implications: Retain the cash-only portfolio until current pricing, broker availability and the separate allocation decision align.
Keep broad U.S. equity UCITS lines at the front of the implementation queue because their identity and pricing evidence are most mature.
Treat technology and semiconductor exposure as a satellite candidate subject to concentration discipline, not as an automatic core holding.

policy_catalysts.policy_area: U.S. disinflation and Federal Reserve patience
policy_catalysts.latest_signal: June inflation softened materially, reducing the immediate probability of further tightening while officials continue to seek confirmation.
ECB officials favour caution after the June rate increase and remain alert to oil-driven inflation without signalling an immediate additional move.
Strong semiconductor demand and improved industry guidance continue to support the structural compute and infrastructure lane.

source_evidence.title: ECB policymakers take measured tone on price risks but urge vigilance
Fed chair Warsh sidesteps Senate questions on inflation, AI, contact with Trump
